title: Concerns settled, share buybacks could flow via exchanges again
summary: Sebi is proposing to bring back share buybacks via stock exchanges. This reverses a decision made a year ago. New tax rules have resolved earlier concerns about fairness and tax distortions. Public shareholders will now be taxed on actual capital gains, similar to market sales. This change aims to ensure equal participation for all shareholders.

title: HDFC Bank penalises 12 execs for role in mis-selling AT1 bonds

This action follows previous sackings and suspensions, with the bank attributing the issue to technical documentation and regulatory interpretation lapses rather than fraud.

title: Indices plunge 2%, then ride rupee rebound to log gains

Volatility remains a concern, though technical indicators suggest a potential near-term pullback.

title: The architecture of resilience: Why India’s private credit stands apart
summary: India’s private credit market stands resilient amid global stress due to its conservative fund structures, strict leverage norms, and closed-ended AIF framework. Unlike global peers facing liquidity and redemption pressures, India’s system aligns investor timelines with asset maturity, reducing systemic risks while offering significant growth headroom in an underpenetrated market.
